programme.title: The Legend of Zorro
programme.desc: The masked swordsman (Antonio Banderas) and his wife (Catherine Zeta-Jones) fight a European count (Rufus Sewell) plotting to block Californias statehood. Starring Antonio Banderas, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Disgraced Secret Service agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped inside the White House in the wake of a terrorist attack and works with national security to rescue the President from his kidnappers. Starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Antoine, a young French man, searches for his presumed-to-be-dead sister in Syria; while unraveling the mystery, Antoine ends up joining forces with a unit of Kurdish female fighters and traveling with them in ISIS-occupied territory.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Ellies journey takes an unexpected turn as suspicions about a possible connection with the FBI grow; a dangerous encounter forces her to make a fateful choice, while shifting loyalties blur the lines between trust and betrayal.

programme.title: Through Black Spruce
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young Cree woman in Toronto traumatizes her Northern Ontario family and sends her twin sister on a journey south to find her. Starring Tanaya Beatty, Kiowa Gordon, Brandon Oakes.

programme.title: Real Time
programme.desc: A killer gives a gambler an hour to live. Starring Randy Quaid, Jay Baruchel, Ella Chan.

programme.title: Gabrielle
programme.desc: A young woman who has Williams syndrome possesses amazing musical talents but struggles continually to gain her independence. Starring Gabrielle Marion-Rivard, Vincent-Guillaume Otis, Sebastien Ricard.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a superhero begins to thwart crime in the city, the Sanctuary team must capture him to discover if he is an Abnormal.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus wakes to find the Sanctuary in ruins and the entire city decimated with no memory of how the devastation occurred.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A little girl develops extraordinary mental abilities, despite neglectful parents and a brutal headmistress. Starring Mara Wilson, Danny DeVito, Rhea Perlman.

programme.title: The Seventh Victim
programme.desc: A young woman (Kim Hunter) seeks her sister (Jean Brooks) and finds Greenwich Village satanists and Dantes Restaurant. Starring Tom Conway, Kim Hunter, Jean Brooks.

programme.title: I Was Born, But ...
programme.desc: Two brothers move to a new neighborhood in the Tokyo suburbs after their father, an office clerk, gets a promotion. The boys join the local gang as lowly new kids and emerge as natural leaders after defeating a bully. Starring Tatsuo Saitô, Takeshi Sakamoto, Mitsuko Yoshikawa.

programme.title: The Only Son
programme.desc: A mother sends her son to Tokyo for a better life, and 13 years later she visits. Starring Choko Iida, Shinichi Himori, Masao Hayama.

programme.title: A Story of Floating Weeds
programme.desc: An actors mistress schemes to bring down her lovers son. Starring Takeshi Sakamoto, Choko Iida, Kôji Mitsui.

programme.title: Broadway Melody of 1938
programme.desc: A Broadway producer (Robert Taylor) bankrolls his musical with winnings from the stars (Eleanor Powell) horse at Saratoga. Starring Robert Taylor, Eleanor Powell, Judy Garland.

programme.title: For Me and My Gal
programme.desc: Vaudeville song-and-dance partners (Judy Garland, Gene Kelly) separated by World War I reunite in love on Broadway. Starring Judy Garland, Gene Kelly, George Murphy.

programme.title: Kiss Me Kate
programme.desc: Lilli and Fred act the same way offstage as they do in The Taming of the Shrew. Starring Kathryn Grayson, Howard Keel, Ann Miller.

programme.title: Gold Diggers of 1935
programme.desc: Romance strikes when a vacationing millionairess and her daughter spend their vacation at a posh New England resort. Starring Dick Powell, Gloria Stuart, Adolphe Menjou.

programme.title: Born to Dance
programme.desc: A tap-dancing understudy (Eleanor Powell) meets a sailor (James Stewart) on leave and replaces the star (Virginia Bruce) of a show. Starring Eleanor Powell, James Stewart, Virginia Bruce.

programme.title: Top Hat
programme.desc: A woman (Ginger Rogers) believes that an enamored dancer (Fred Astaire) is her best friends husband. Starring Fred Astaire, Ginger Rogers, Edward Everett Horton.

programme.title: Thats Dancing!
programme.desc: Gene Kelly, Sammy Davis Jr., Mikhail Baryshnikov, Ray Bolger and Liza Minnelli narrate clips, from Busby Berkeley musicals to Michael Jackson performances. Starring Gina Trikonis, Carole DAndrea, Francesca Bellini.

programme.title: Man of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Makeup genius and actor Lon Chaney (James Cagney) marries two women (Dorothy Malone, Jane Greer) and stars in silent classics like "The Phantom of the Opera." Starring James Cagney, Dorothy Malone, Jane Greer.

programme.title: Valentino
programme.desc: Reporters hear lurid tales at the funeral of silent-film sex symbol Rudolph Valentino (Rudolf Nureyev). Starring Rudolf Nureyev, Leslie Caron, Michelle Phillips.

programme.title: The Perils of Pauline
programme.desc: Unknown Pearl White (Betty Hutton) becomes "queen of the silent serials," famous as a heroine in distress. Starring Betty Hutton, John Lund, Billy De Wolfe.

programme.title: The Jolson Story
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, young Asa Yoelson decides to go against the wishes of his cantor father and pursue a career in show business. Starring Larry Parks, Evelyn Keyes, William Demarest.

programme.title: Jeanne Eagels
programme.desc: A 1920s dancer/actress (Kim Novak) leaves her jealous lover (Jeff Chandler) for Broadway, Hollywood and alcoholic decline. Starring Kim Novak, Jeff Chandler, Agnes Moorehead.

programme.title: Grand Hotel
programme.desc: A ballerina (Greta Garbo), baron (John Barrymore), stenographer (Joan Crawford), bookkeeper and tycoon check into Berlins Grand Hotel. Starring Greta Garbo, Joan Crawford, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Riptide
programme.desc: The wife (Norma Shearer) of an English lord (Herbert Marshall) has a grounds-for-divorce encounter with a playboy (Robert Montgomery) from her past. Starring Norma Shearer, Robert Montgomery, Herbert Marshall.

programme.title: A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: Groucho, Chico and Harpo go to Italy and bring opera and its patrons down to their level. Starring Groucho Marx, Harpo Marx, Kitty Carlisle Hart.

programme.title: Dark Victory
programme.desc: An heiress (Bette Davis) with only months to live embarks on a social whirl, then marries her doctor (George Brent). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: The Constant Nymph
programme.desc: A 14-year-old teen adores a promising composer (Charles Boyer), who is quite fond of the girl (Joan Fontaine), but his romance with her older cousin (Alexis Smith) and following marriage create an emotional rivalry that affects the three. Starring Charles Boyer, Joan Fontaine, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Of Human Bondage
programme.desc: Based on the novel by W. Somerset Maugham. A doctor-artist develops a tragic infatuation with a promiscuous waitress. Starring Eleanor Parker, Paul Henreid, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Our Vines Have Tender Grapes
programme.desc: A Norwegian farmer (Edward G. Robinson) lovingly raises his daughter (Margaret OBrien) in Benson Junction, Wis. Starring Edward G. Robinson, Margaret OBrien, James Craig.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: A San Francisco police detective (Chevy Chase) protects a librarian (Goldie Hawn) who knows too much about a plot to kill the pope. Starring Goldie Hawn, Chevy Chase, Burgess Meredith.

programme.title: No Name on the Bullet
programme.desc: Townsfolk know a gunmans (Audie Murphy) going to kill someone, but they dont know who it will be. Starring Audie Murphy, Charles Drake, Joan Evans.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: A corporate climber (Jack Lemmon), whose boss (Fred MacMurray) and others use his apartment for hanky-panky, aids a young woman (Shirley MacLaine). Starring Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, Fred MacMurray.

programme.title: The Goodbye Girl
programme.desc: A divorced dancer (Marsha Mason) and her daughter (Quinn Cummings) must room with an off-off-Broadway actor (Richard Dreyfuss). Starring Richard Dreyfuss, Marsha Mason, Quinn Cummings.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: The Devil Doll
programme.desc: Paul (Lionel Barrymore) is wrongfully convicted of robbery and murder, and breaks out of prison using a scientists shrinking invention. Starring Lionel Barrymore, Maureen OSullivan, Frank Lawton.

programme.title: Doctor X
programme.desc: A reporter (Lee Tracy) saves a mad doctors (Lionel Atwill) daughter (Fay Wray) from a full-moon killer with synthetic flesh. Starring Lionel Atwill, Fay Wray, Lee Tracy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An executed convict returns from the grave to revenge himself against the gangsters who framed him for murder. Starring Boris Karloff, Ricardo Cortez, Edmund Gwenn.

programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: March won an Oscar for his portrayal of the scientist whose experiments bring out a hideous side of his personality. Starring Fredric March, Miriam Hopkins, Rose Hobart.

programme.title: Men Must Fight
programme.desc: The secretary of states (Lewis Stone) wife (Diana Wynyard) and son (Phillips Holmes) oppose a 1940 war, ending with an air raid on New York. Starring Diana Wynyard, Lewis Stone, Phillips Holmes.

programme.title: Things to Come
programme.desc: William Cameron Menzies adaptation of the H.G. Wells novel tells of humankinds efforts to rebuild the war-torn planet. Starring Raymond Massey, Ralph Richardson, Margaretta Scott.

programme.title: Transatlantic Tunnel
programme.desc: An engineer (Richard Dix) leads the building of a trans-Atlantic tunnel linking Britain and the United States. Starring Richard Dix, Leslie Banks, Madge Evans.

programme.title: Non-Stop New York
programme.desc: Gangsters and a detective (John Loder) take an airliner to follow a British chorus girl (Anna Lee) who witnessed a murder. Starring Anna Lee, John Loder, Francis L. Sullivan.

programme.desc: An ex-gunman is torn between his obsession with revenge and his responsibility to a 6-year-old girl and a lonely widow. Starring Gregory Peck, Patricia Quinn, Robert F. Lyons.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: A bearded Scot (Gregory Peck) robs a bank with a young Indian (Desi Arnaz Jr.), then leaves him with an old ranchers young wife. Starring Gregory Peck, Desi Arnaz, Jack Warden.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: A former sea captain (Gregory Peck) goes West, woos women (Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker) and joins a fight over water rights. Starring Gregory Peck, Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker.

programme.desc: Trapped inside a penthouse with little to no cover, a professional sniper must battle an army of thugs to make it out alive. Starring Scott Adkins, Alice Eve, Billy Clements.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: Jess is a woman on the run, desperate to cross the Canadian border to escape her past. On her tail is a resourceful agent whose life-altering diagnosis leaves her one step behind, with the stakes of her pursuit rising to apocalyptic proportions. Starring Sonya Walger, Hayley Erin, Tony Amendola.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofes vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denitas fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielles tragic death; authorities arent buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fanchers bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Rachel Sianis life ended in tragedy, with clues pointing to a dark obsession. The investigation unearths secrets of her double life and the dangers within it.

programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better; to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn about local barbers.

programme.title: Shutter Island (2010)
programme.desc: A 1950s lawman (Leonardo DiCaprio) pursues a murderess who appears to have vanished from a locked room within a fortresslike psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: Seasoned warrior Sarah Connor joins forces with a hybrid cyborg human and the T-800 model to protect a young woman from the Rev-9 -- a newly modified and seemingly indestructible liquid Terminator from the future.

programme.title: Run and Gun (2021)
programme.desc: A former criminal gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: The Corrupted (2019)
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before its too late.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Vindicta (2023)
programme.desc: When a city is terrorized by a sadistic serial killer, a seasoned detective and a newly recruited paramedic are forced into a deadly game of vengeance, only to discover the key to stopping the bloodshed lies in unlocking the truth of their own pasts.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegians (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)
programme.desc: Two policemen (Mark Dacascos, Charlie Sheen) learn that city leaders and law enforcement support heroin trafficking across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegians (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe (2016)
programme.desc: When father and son coroners investigate the death of a beautiful "Jane Doe," they find increasingly bizarre clues.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Anything for Fame
programme.desc: Venturing into the virtual Wild West to profile a new breed of content creator.

programme.title: The Best of Me (2014)
programme.desc: The funeral of a close friend reunites former high-school sweethearts, who find that they are still in love after 20 years apart.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Certain Women (2016)
programme.desc: Three strong-willed women (Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern, Michelle Williams) strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: The Lovers (2014)
programme.desc: An impossible love blooms across two time periods and continents.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Irenas Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army majors housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the majors home.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friends wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Loosies (2011)
programme.desc: A young pickpocket in the New York subways who is living a fast and free lifestyle is confronted by a woman with whom he had a one-night stand. She informs him that she is now pregnant with his child. He must now make a choice.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Match Point (2005)
programme.desc: A one-time tennis professional (Jonathan Rhys-Meyers) becomes obsessed with his brother-in-laws (Matthew Goode) seductive fiancee (Scarlett Johansson).

programme.title: Irenas Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army majors housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the majors home.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love (2024)
programme.desc: Nicholas and Isabel are made for each other, but as destiny pulls them together, family, passion and faith drives them apart. As they embark on journeys of heartache and misplaced love, fate soon contrives to pull the threads of their lives together.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Sheryl (2022)
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Sheryl Crow rises to superstardom and finds a way to turn even her darkest experiences into captivating, timeless work -- creating a legacy that continues to inspire and influence generations.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepards (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Rosemarys Baby (1968)
programme.desc: A pregnant womans (Mia Farrow) husband (John Cassavetes) and their satanic neighbors want her baby to be the Antichrist.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the worlds wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.
